## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Feb 2, 2026 - Jul 13, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Miles Roche_, Feb 2, 2026, 4/5: "This is an amazing app! I love the ui design and feel. It is perfect apart from a few minor/annoying bugs I have found. Apart from those, its perfect! I've noticed that you can't change the order of the tasks in checklists or rename them without starting again, and the back button during the workout menu doesn't work. ilI would also love to see some improvement of the actual workouts. If I could change the reps and weights without having to go back and edit the workout it would be much better."
